description_long: This object represents a highly stylized, abstracted adult pedestrian figure, with a sharply angular and minimalist form. The body is rendered as a narrow, tapered structure with a central vertical section that widens dramatically at the top, suggesting outstretched arms or a broad-shouldered stance. The extremities are elongated and thin, with a subtle bend, giving the impression of arms angled outward. The lower section narrows to a point, evoking the legs or feet, while the upper section is slightly flared. The surface finish appears smooth and the form is devoid of detailed anatomical features, focusing instead on geometric simplicity. The overall silhouette is reminiscent of modernist sculpture, emphasizing form over realism.
description: A highly abstract, angular adult pedestrian figure with outstretched, tapered arms and a minimalist, geometric body.
description_view_0: Seen from the front, the figure displays a V-shaped silhouette with wide, angled arms and a narrow lower body.
description_view_1: From the left side, the figure appears as a thin, elongated wedge with a slight upward tilt at the top.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a broad, gently curved upper section tapering to a narrow base, emphasizing the width of the arms.
description_view_3: From the right side, the figure mirrors the left, with a slim, angular profile and a pointed lower section.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted form with no discernible clothing details
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms angled outward
